steps.title: Recognize the cause-and-effect structure
steps.content: The word “thus” signals we need a logical consequence. The passage establishes a cause: military service familiarizes veterans with the organizational structures they'll encounter in civilian government. The blank must show what naturally follows from this familiarity.

steps.title: Complete the logical chain
steps.content:
Familiarity makes a system more appealing to navigate—when you understand how it works, pursuing jobs within it becomes more attractive.

Choice A captures this: the familiarity makes civilian government jobs appealing to veterans, explaining why they're overrepresented.

The other three don't follow from familiarity—they involve altering relationships, reversing causality, or changing job requirements.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
